assets.description: Recognition-grade H/V main-signal head capable of displaying Hp 0, Hp 1 and Hp 2.
Recognition-grade H/V distant-signal head capable of displaying Vr 0, Vr 1 and Vr 2.
A main signal and distant signal mounted together. The main aspect controls authority at this signal; the distant aspect announces the next main signal.
playerReadingOrder: Read the main Hp aspect first to determine whether and how you may pass this signal.
Then read the Vr aspect to understand what to expect at the next main signal.
Apply any Zs 3 current-speed indication and Zs 3v announced-speed indication separately.

validExamples.summary: Proceed here, expect stop at the next main signal.
Proceed at restricted speed here, expect restricted speed at the next main signal.
Proceed here, expect proceed at the next main signal.
